title: tylophora subnuda
intro: Tylophora subnuda is a plant species belonging to the Asclepiadaceae family, commonly known as the milkweed family. It is a type of climber or shrub native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India, Sri Lanka, and Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to the presence of bioactive compounds like tylophorine, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory activities. The health benefits of Tylophora subnuda include its potential to treat asthma, bronchitis, and other respiratory disorders, as well as its use in traditional herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions.
